mapper.select: SELECT distinct extract(year_month from s.summary_date) settlementDate, s.sell_match_user_id matchUserId, sum(s.sell_match_amount) sellMatchAmount, sum(s.buy_match_amount) buyMatchAmount, sum(s.sell_head_commission_amount) sellHeadCommissionAmount, sum(s.buy_head_commission_amount) buyHeadCommissionAmount FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement s where s.settle_status = '2' and s.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and s.match_credit_flg = #{matchCreditFlg} and s.settle_total_flg = false GROUP BY s.sell_match_user_id, extract(year_month from s.summary_date)

SELECT IFNULL(extract(year_month from s.summary_date),0) settlementDate, s.sell_match_user_id matchUserId, IFNULL(sum(s.sell_match_amount),0) sellMatchAmount, IFNULL(sum(s.buy_match_amount),0) buyMatchAmount, IFNULL(sum(s.sell_head_commission_amount),0) sellHeadCommissionAmount, IFNULL(sum(s.buy_head_commission_amount),0) buyHeadCommissionAmount FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement s where s.settle_status = '2' and s.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and s.settle_total_flg = false and s.match_credit_flg = #{matchCreditFlg} and s.sell_match_user_id = #{matchUserId} and extract(year_month from s.summary_date) = #{settlementDate} GROUP BY s.sell_match_user_id, extract(year_month from s.summary_date)
